summary: The implementation successfully adds Hindi and English language support with paragraph-based organization. All requirements (REQ-7 through REQ-11) are implemented with backend data model updates, API endpoints, frontend UI components, and filtering functionality. Language selection persists via localStorage, and the migration preserves existing recordings while adding new fields.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend API endpoint getRecordingsByClassAndLanguage that combines class and language filtering
hallucinated_features.reason: This combined filtering endpoint was not requested in any requirement. The BuildRequest only specified separate filtering by class, language, and paragraph.
